atoms.semantic_claim: The reth-evm-ethereum crate declares a direct revm-context dependency for async-context-aware EVM construction surfaces.

destinations.evidence: The destination crate manifest has the workspace revm-context package available at the root but does not declare it as a dependency of reth-evm-ethereum.
The workspace dependency exists, so the missing mapping is the crate-level manifest edge.

atoms.equivalence_argument: The old direct dependency edge is obsolete for this crate because the async-capable TxEnv and EVM context are selected in ritual-alloy-evm-internal and ritual-revm-internal.
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Build reth-evm-ethereum with async-context enabled and code paths requiring revm_context types; assert the crate does not rely on undeclared transitive dependencies.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: confirmed not a live build/FSM bug. Current reth-evm-ethereum has no direct revm_context imports; async TxEnv/context wiring is provided by Alloy/Revm dependency layers.

atoms.semantic_claim: The reth-evm-ethereum crate declares tracing so EVM block assembly can emit debug diagnostics for dynamic or oversized extra_data handling.

destinations.evidence: The destination crate manifest does not declare tracing.
The destination build path consumes context extra_data but does not import tracing or emit the source large-extra_data debug diagnostic.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Build the EVM crate with the dynamic extra_data diagnostic path enabled and assert tracing is declared directly rather than leaking through another dependency.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: confirmed missing telemetry only. No tracing dependency or oversized-extra_data debug diagnostic exists in reth-evm-ethereum.

atoms.semantic_claim: The reth-evm-ethereum crate exposes an async-context feature that forwards to reth-evm/async-context.

destinations.evidence: The destination manifest contains the same feature forwarding.

atoms.negative_test_candidate: Run cargo metadata for reth-evm-ethereum with async-context enabled and assert reth-evm/async-context is activated.

adversarial_reviews.reason: Mechanical review completed; remaining non-exact atoms are now confirmed covered, confirmed missing, intentionally absent, or support/test/telemetry only.

summary: Mechanical review complete. The direct revm-context edge is not needed by current reth-evm-ethereum code because async TxEnv wiring lives in Alloy/Revm dependencies; the oversized-extra_data tracing dependency/diagnostic remains a confirmed telemetry-only omission.
notes: Queue entry 77 was verified as M\tcrates/ethereum/evm/Cargo.toml; only diff lines 16045-16071 were analyzed for this record. Mechanical review review-files-0077-0089-mechanical completed; all prior needs-review atoms have definitive verdicts.
